sentences.arabic: يَحْرِصُ سَامِي عَلَى تَنْظِيمِ وَقْتِهِ بَيْنَ الْمَكْتَبِ وَالْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Sami se brine o organizaciji svog vremena između kancelarije i kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Sami is careful to organize his time between the office and home.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَأْخُذُ أَعْمَالَ الْمَكْتَبِ مَعَهُ إِلَى بَيْتِهِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Nikada ne nosi kancelarijske poslove sa sobom kući.
sentences.translationEn: He never takes office work home with him.

sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي وَقْتَ الْفَرَاغِ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ وَيُمَارِسُ الرِّيَاضَةَ.
sentences.translation: Slobodno vrijeme provodi sa svojom porodicom i bavi se sportom.
sentences.translationEn: He spends his free time with his family and practices sports.
